dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(10),MA001) AS MA001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(30),MA002) AS MA002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(80),MA003) AS MA003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(20),MA006) AS MA006,
CONVERT(nvarchar(20),MA008) AS MA008,
MA009,MA018,MA023,MODI_DATE 
from COPMA where MODI_DATE  is not null and MODI_DATE <> ''
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.MODELNAME: 浙江超行产品信息更新
dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB001) AS MB001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB002) AS MB002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB003) AS MB003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(6),MB004) AS MB004,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB010) AS MB010,
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),MB011) AS MB011,
MODI_DATE,UDF02,UDF03,UDF04,MB007
from INVMB WHERE MODI_DATE IS NOT NULL AND MODI_DATE <> ''
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.MODELNAME: 浙江超行产品信息新增
dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB001) AS MB001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB002) AS MB002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB003) AS MB003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(6),MB004) AS MB004,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB010) AS MB010,
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),MB011) AS MB011,
CREATE_DATE,
UDF02,UDF03,UDF04,MB007
from INVMB
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT: select TB001,TB002,TB003,TB012,TB013,CREATE_DATE from MOCTB m where TB003 like '6%'
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT: select TB001,TB002,TB003,TB012,TB013,MODI_DATE from MOCTB m where TB003 like '6%'
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 
CONVERT(nvarchar(10),MD001) AS MD001, 
CONVERT(nvarchar(40),MD002) AS MD002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(12),MD003) AS MD003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(255),MD011) AS MD011,
MODI_DATE 
FROM CMSMD
UNION
SELECT 
CONVERT(nvarchar(10),MA001) AS MA001, 
CONVERT(nvarchar(40),MA002) AS MA002,
'outSource' AS MA004,
CONVERT(nvarchar(255),MA040) AS MA040,
MODI_DATE
from PURMA) A
WHERE MODI_DATE IS NOT NULL AND MODI_DATE <> ''
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),TA001) AS TA001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),TA002) AS TA002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA006) AS TA006,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA034) AS TA034,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA035) AS TA035,
CONVERT(nvarchar(6),TA007) AS TA007,
case when TA009 is null then '' else CONVERT(datetime,TA009) END AS TA009,
case when TA010 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(datetime,TA010) END  AS TA010,
CONVERT(numeric(16,3),CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(TA015) = 0  THEN -999 else TA015 END) AS TA015,
CONVERT(nvarchar(4),TA026) AS TA026,
CONVERT(nvarchar(15),TA027) AS TA027,
CONVERT(nvarchar(200),TA028) AS TA028,
CONVERT(nvarchar(12),TA019) AS TA019,
CONVERT(nvarchar(10),TA020) AS TA020,
CONVERT(nvarchar(255),TA029) AS TA029,
CASE WHEN TA003 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(datetime,TA003) END AS TA003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(1),TA044) AS TA044,
CONVERT(int,CASE TA011 WHEN 'Y' THEN 99 WHEN 'y' THEN 100 WHEN '1' THEN 1 WHEN '2' THEN 2 ELSE -999 END) AS TA011,
CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE_TIME,TA013
from MOCTA
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB001)) AS MB001,
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB002)) AS MB002,
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB003)) AS MB003,
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(6),MB004)) AS MB004,
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(120),MB010)) AS MB010,
RTRIM(CONVERT(nvarchar(50),MB011)) AS MB011,
RTRIM(CONVERT(char(6),MB090)) AS MB090,
MODI_DATE 
from INVMB WHERE MODI_DATE IS NOT NULL AND MODI_DATE <> ''
dataModel.creator: sa

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(4),MW001) AS MW001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(40),MW002) AS MW002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(255),MW003) AS MW003,
CONVERT(int,ISNULL(MW004,'-999')) AS MW004,
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),MW005) AS MW005,
MODI_DATE 
from CMSMW WHERE MODI_DATE is not null and MODI_DATE <> ''

dataModel.SQLSCRIPT:
select 
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),TA001) AS TA001,
CONVERT(nvarchar(50),TA002) AS TA002,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA006) AS TA006,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA034) AS TA034,
CONVERT(nvarchar(120),TA035) AS TA035,
CONVERT(nvarchar(6),TA007) AS TA007,
case when TA009 is null then '' else CONVERT(datetime,TA009) END AS TA009,
case when TA010 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(datetime,TA010) END  AS TA010,
CONVERT(numeric(16,3),CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(TA015) = 0  THEN -999 else TA015 END) AS TA015,
CONVERT(nvarchar(4),TA026) AS TA026,
CONVERT(nvarchar(15),TA027) AS TA027,
CONVERT(nvarchar(200),TA028) AS TA028,
CONVERT(nvarchar(12),TA019) AS TA019,
CONVERT(nvarchar(10),TA020) AS TA020,
CONVERT(nvarchar(255),TA029) AS TA029,
CASE WHEN TA003 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CONVERT(datetime,TA003) END AS TA003,
CONVERT(nvarchar(1),TA044) AS TA044,
CONVERT(int,CASE TA011 WHEN 'Y' THEN 99 WHEN 'y' THEN 100 WHEN '1' THEN 1 WHEN '2' THEN 2 WHEN '3' THEN 3 ELSE -999 END) AS TA011,
MODI_DATE,TA013
from MOCTA where MODI_DATE <> '' and MODI_DATE is not null
dataModel.creator: sa
